description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish release to PyPI that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: one to build a Python package distribution and another to upload it to PyPI. The build job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, caches pip dependencies, installs system and Python dependencies, checks the manifest, builds the package, and uploads the build result as an artifact. The PyPI publish job waits for the build job, downloads the artifact, and publishes it to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
